actionability.enrolled_students: Track total cohort size to plan placement-drive capacity and employer meeting schedules.
actionability.avg_match_score: Compare against the university benchmark (e.g. 0.65). If below, launch upskilling workshops before the next placement cycle.
actionability.top_3_recommended_jobs: Focus employer outreach on these roles — they have the highest predicted fit across your student body.
actionability.students_with_high_confidence_recommenda: These students are 'placement-ready'. Prioritise scheduling their interviews before slots fill.
actionability.students_with_zero_candidates: These students need urgent attention: either upskilling, resume improvement, or relaxed matching thresholds.
